title: Mutation
description: Gain power as you kill mobs — unlock Dash, Rage Mode, and Lightning abilities as your Mutation Level increases.
body:
🧬 Mutation – Evolve Through Combat

Grow stronger with every kill.
Unlock devastating powers.
Become unstoppable.

Mutation is a progression-based Fabric mod where your power evolves as you defeat mobs.
The more you fight, the stronger you become.

No grinding menus.
No complicated skill trees.
Just pure combat progression.

⚔️ Core Gameplay

Kill mobs → Gain Mutation Progress → Level Up → Unlock Stronger Abilities.

Your Mutation Level increases automatically based on mob kills.

Every 20 mob kills = +1 Mutation Level.

Higher levels make your abilities stronger and unlock advanced powers.

🎮 Abilities & Controls
⚡ Dash (Default: G)

Instantly dash forward

Lightning activation effect

Knockback nearby enemies

Scales with Mutation Level

10 second cooldown

The higher your level, the stronger and faster your dash becomes.

🔥 Rage Mode (Default: R)

Strength boost

Speed boost

Area knockback burst

Lightning storm visual effect

Duration scales with level

30 second cooldown

Rage Mode turns you into a temporary combat monster.

🌩 Ultimate Awakening (Default: H)

Unlocks at Mutation Level 5+

Massive lightning burst

Large area shockwave

Huge knockback

Dragon roar sound effect

60 second cooldown

This is your high-impact combat finisher.

📊 Mutation Level System

Kill mobs to increase Mutation Level

XP BossBar shows live progress

Actionbar shows ability cooldowns

Fully integrated combat progression

Persistent in singleplayer

Level formula:

Level = 1 + (MobKills / 20)


Simple. Clean. Powerful.

✨ Features

✔ Combat-based progression
✔ Scalable ability strength
✔ Cooldown management system
✔ Lightning & particle effects
✔ XP BossBar display
✔ Singleplayer persistence
✔ Clean Fabric networking implementation

🛠 Requirements

Minecraft 1.21.x

Fabric Loader

Fabric API

📥 Support & Community

💬 Join the Discord community:
https://discord.gg/eCsHE7SeXA

☕ Support development:
https://buymeacoffee.com/anbuleon

Your support helps bring new powers, mutations, and future expansions.

🔮 Planned Features (Future Updates)

Mutation Types (Fire / Lightning / Shadow)

Skill Tree System

Multiplayer balancing

Boss Mutation events

Visual aura upgrades

Made with passion by Anbu.

Evolve. Adapt. Dominate.
